chapter_title.ar: باب الْجُنُبِ يَعْرَقُ فِي الثَّوْبِ أَوْ يُصِيبُ جَسَدُهُ ثَوْبَهُ وَ هُوَ رَطْبٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 34 – The one with sexual impurity sweats in the clothes, or his body touches his clothes and he is wet

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/153)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/153)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يُصِيبُنِي السَّمَاءُ وَ عَلَيَّ ثَوْبٌ فَتَبُلُّهُ وَ أَنَا جُنُبٌ فَيُصِيبُ بَعْضَ مَا أَصَابَ جَسَدِي مِنَ الْمَنِيِّ أَ فَأُصَلِّي فِيهِ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from Abu Asama who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘I am exposed to the (open) sky and upon me are clothes, and I am with sexual impurity, so part of it hits that part of my body which has semen, can I pray Salaat in these?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj from abu ‘Usamah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about my exposure in the open, under the sky because of which my clothes become wet, while I have experienced sexual relation, and such clothes reach the part of my body which is polluted with semen, can I perform Salah (prayer) in such clothes? He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, you can do so.’”
